data.title: 国际服4周年倒数登陆奖励
data.summary: Attention! Schale has a special announcement! Blue Archive's 4-Year Anniversary! Earn Pyroxenes ever
data.body:
Attention! Schale has a special announcement!

 



 

Blue Archive's 4-Year Anniversary!

 

Earn Pyroxenes every day by checking out the new countdown images celebrating the 4-Year Anniversary!

 

 

🔹 Event Schedule

- 11/1 (Sat) 7:00 PM – 11/8 (Sat) 6:59 PM (UTC)

 

🔹 Event Details

- Earn gifts by logging into the game every day during the event.

  * Tap on each day's countdown image to claim your daily gift and proceed to the Lobby.

  * Daily attendance gifts reset every day at 7:00 PM (UTC).

  ㄴ When you see the "The date has changed" pop up at 7:00 PM (UTC), go to the title screen.

     - You can obtain the Attendance Gift for the next day once the new day begins.

 

🔹 Event Rewards

| Schedule | Countdown Image | Attendance Gift |
| - | - | - |
| Day 1 (D-7) | Valkyrie Police School | Pyroxene x100 |
| Day 2 (D-6) | Shanhaijing Academy Black Tortoise Promenade | Pyroxene x100 |
| Day 3 (D-5) | Millennium Science School Super Phenomenon Task Force & Toki | Pyroxene x100 |
| Day 4 (D-4) | Highlander Railroad Academy | Pyroxene x100 |
| Day 5 (D-3) | Trinity General School Antique Seraphim | Pyroxene x100 |
| Day 6 (D-2) | Allied Hyakkiyako Academy Festival Operations Department | Pyroxene x100 |
| Day 7 (D-1) | Gehenna Academy Pandemonium Society | Pyroxene x100 |

 * You'll receive a letter titled "I'm looking forwad to today, Sensei!" in your mailbox. 

 

 

❗ Notes ❗

∙ You can only claim each Attendance Gift once per account, and it will be sent to your mailbox. (Mailbox Storage Date: 7 days)

∙ If you miss the gift claim period, you won't be able to claim them.
